summary.compositionGateDetails: Logo fix resolved. The header now renders as a compact horizontal dark bar at both breakpoints, matching the Figma design proportions. The logo is properly constrained (max-h-[58px] desktop, max-h-[26px] mobile) and the nav bar no longer expands to accommodate oversized images.
summary.reRunContext: Re-run after DQA-001 fix (logo max-height constraint). Previous status: FAIL. Previous composition gate: FAIL.

previousIssueResolution.verification: Logo is now constrained to max 58px tall on desktop and max 26px on mobile. Implementation screenshot confirms the header appears as a compact horizontal bar matching Figma proportions. The fix is present in both HeaderMain.php (line 60) and HeaderMain.tsx (lines 593, 604). Classes added: **:max-h-[58px] max-md:**:max-h-[26px] **:object-contain.

notes.observation: The test page uses a square bee favicon as the logo image, while the Figma design shows the full IGNITE logo (bee icon + wordmark, ~215px wide x ~58px tall). This is a content/upload difference, not a code issue. The code correctly constrains whatever image is uploaded via max-height and object-contain. The full IGNITE logo should be uploaded for production use.

passedChecks.description: Overall composition matches Figma. Compact horizontal dark bar with logo left, utility row top-right, nav row bottom-right.
Logo properly constrained. max-h-[58px] matches Figma's 57.685px logo height (0.315px difference, within tolerance).
Nav bar background: bg-charcoal (#1f1f1d) vs Figma #1e1e1c. 1-unit RGB difference, imperceptible and within tolerance.
Nav bar rounded corners: rounded-[25px]. Matches Figma exactly.
Nav bar padding: px-8 (32px) py-4 (16px). Figma: px-32 py-16. Exact match.
Nav items: General Sans Medium 16px uppercase white leading-[1.16]. Matches Figma exactly.
Search form: 250px width, border-b border-white, search icon + text. Matches Figma.
SEP link: 'STUDENT ENGAGEMENT PLATFORM' with external arrow icon, gap-8. Matches Figma.
Vertical separator between search and SEP: w-px white line. Matches Figma.
Gap between utility row and nav row: gap-6 (24px). Figma: gap-24. Exact match.
Gap between nav items: gap-8 (32px). Figma: gap-32. Exact match.
Overall mobile composition matches Figma. SEP button above compact nav bar with logo and hamburger.
Logo properly constrained on mobile. max-h-[26px] matches Figma's 25.599px (0.401px difference, within tolerance).
SEP mobile button: bg-charcoal, rounded-full, p-4 (16px), gap-3, text-white uppercase + ExternalArrow.svg. Matches Figma's rounded-[119px] p-16.
Gap between SEP button and nav bar: gap-2 (8px). Figma: gap-8. Exact match.
Mobile toggle (hamburger) button present with correct positioning. md:hidden, aria attributes present.
Nav bar padding on mobile: px-8 (32px) py-4 (16px). Matches Figma.

contentResilienceVerification.details: The logo now has proper CSS constraints (max-height + object-contain) ensuring the header maintains correct proportions regardless of the uploaded image's aspect ratio. Tested with a square favicon image -- the logo remains constrained and the nav bar stays compact.

fixDetails.syncStatus: PHP and TSX classes are identical
